label: A calmer, smarter home screen
items: Your greeting now tells you what matters in one sentence — “Good morning — 3 tasks left before today's rain” — instead of repeating the same numbers in banner after banner.
On the detailed view, a compact status line replaces the big brief card: tasks · overdue · weather · golden hour, each one tappable.
Far less clutter: duplicate alerts and counts are gone, the stats wall starts tucked away, and the Garden Walk lives with your quick actions.
A quiet golden-hour and sunset line keeps you connected to the day's light.
